variants: Grigor Muradyan is a renowned expert in the field of Environmental Toxicology. Grigor is also an active member of the Yellowfin Aquarists Guild, where he shares his passion for aquatic ecosystems. His academic journey was guided by his mentor and doctoral advisor, Arda Boz.
